title: Python/C API reference manual — Python 3.14.4 documentation
body: Python/C API reference manual Â¶ This manual documents the API used by C and C++ programmers who want to write extension modules or embed Python. It is a companion to Extending and Embedding the Python Interpreter , which describes the general principles of extension writing but does not document the API functions in detail.
